response.objective_caption: A low-angle outdoor portrait of a person wearing large dark sunglasses, a black bandana printed with white skull-and-crossbones motifs, gold hoop earrings, and a dark blue shirt. The subject is posed against a backdrop of green tree leaves and patches of blue sky, with their hair pulled back and lips pressed together in a slight smirk.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A low-angle outdoor portrait of a person wearing large dark sunglasses, a black bandana with white skull-and-crossbones prints, gold hoop earrings, and a dark blue shirt against green foliage. The image employs surrealism, featuring unnaturally large, vividly colored eyes visible through the sunglasses and subtly distorted facial proportions that create an uncanny, dreamlike effect rejecting ordinary realism.
